description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat, gently sloped gable roof and a symmetrical layout. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brickwork, complemented by large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. Both sides of the building are flanked by covered patios or carports with dark, flat roofs, providing sheltered outdoor space. The rear facade mirrors the front with similar window arrangements and access points, while the ends of the structure are more solid, with minimal fenestration and utility access. The roof is a prominent feature, with its clean lines and shallow pitch, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is single-story, with a clear division between living spaces and private rooms visible through the window and door placements.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with light brick walls, large front and rear windows, and covered patios on both sides. The flat gable roof and symmetrical design give it a contemporary, open feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and covered patios on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick end wall, minimal windows, and the extension of the covered patio or carport.
description_view_2: Rear view with large windows and doors, mirroring the front facade, and visible patio structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the solid end wall and patio extension.
